name: Red Devil's Food Cake - Betty Crocker
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix all dry ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Add wet ingredients and mix until well combined.
4. Pour batter into greased baking pan.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until toothpick inserted comes out clean.
6. Cool completely before frosting with Creamy Vanilla Frosting.
